hero.title: Igicumbi cy'ubuhanzi, ubushakashatsi, hamwe n'ibitekerezo rusange
hero.subtitle: Ahantu ho kubyara ibitekerezo, ubushakashatsi n'imyidagaduro y'ubugeni.

about.title: Ibyerekeye
about.body: Ikigo cya Gihanga cy’Ubugeni bugezweho GICA ni ikigo kidaharanira inyungu kizatangira vuba, cyashinzwe na Kaneza Schaal na Kami Gahiga. GICA izaba igicumbi cy’isomero, imurikabikorwa, urubuga rwo kwidagaduriramo no gukinirwa imikino, icyumba cyo kwerekeramo amashusho, sitidiyo n’uburyo bwo kwakira abahanzi. Cyakozwe n’umwubatsi w’umunyarwanda Amin Gafaranga, inyubako ifite ubuso bwa metero kare 777 yagenewe gushyigikira abahanzi b’Abanyarwanda n’akarere binyuze mu imurikabikorwa riteguwe neza, ahantu ho gusangirira ibikorwa by’ubuhanzi, no mu bushake bwo guteza imbere ibiganiro n’uguhangana kw’imitima mu by’ubugeni.
